decision: Implementation of Architectural Safety Warning in DB_LOCK
rationale: threading.Lock is insufficient for multi-worker uvicorn. Added warning to prevent silent data corruption in production.

decision: Decoupling Serial Truncation from Core Logic
rationale: Magic number 14 was a risk for data loss on contracts with longer serials. Moved to config.MAX_SERIAL_LENGTH.
Eliminate architectural drift and reliance on stale logs by creating persistent JSON-based system awareness.
Isolate operational panels; Role 'insumos' for supplies, 'manutencao' for technical field work.
Contractual SLA tracking for field backup returns via DataEntradaManutencao calculation.
Move data joining and enrichment logic from API Routers to EquipmentService to ensure thin routers and testable business logic.
Unified role 'insumos' (plural) to match App.jsx RBAC and sidebar filtering requirements.
